title: neonauclea cyclophylla
intro: Neonauclea cyclophylla, also known as the "Kapok tree," is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of the Pacific and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever and soothing digestive issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral properties. Neonauclea cyclophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use, and is often combined with other plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
